title: uDdeExecute
text: uDdeExecute Sends a command string to a DDE server application. Parameters in: $50 Service name $51 Topic name $53 Data item out: $status 0 =success, -1 =failure Description The syntax and semantics of the command string depend on the server application. Note: The maximum number of bytes sent by uDdeExecute is set by UGETREGC. Currently, this is 7999 bytes. In the following example, uDdeExecute is used to open a worksheet in OpenOffice Calc, move the focus to a certain cell and paste the contents of a Uniface field into that cell: $50="Calc" $51="system" $53="[Open(%%"c:/wrksht.ods%%")][Select(%%"R4C5%%")][Formula(%%"%%field%%%%%")]" activate "udde".uDdeExecute() if ($status=0) message "Execute succeeded" else message "Execute did not succeed" endif Copy Was this topic helpful?
